loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC-2A outgoing feeder breakdown; 3 members (Axial Fan Panel-1, Frisking+Security, Axial Fan Panel-2) are dark (no data) and render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing real-time power distribution across 23 feeders; 3 members (Axial Fan Panel-1, Axial Fan Panel-2, Frisking+Security) are dark (no data) and render as blank rows.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total feeder consumption from outgoing feeders; contracted supply capacity is unknown for this asset (rated_kw/contracted_kw not logged), so headroom/overload risk cannot be quantified.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend from PRIMARY outgoing feeders; some members (Axial Fan Panel-1, Axial Fan Panel-2, Frisking+Security) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing per-member Voltage, Current Unbalance, and Electrical Load from the 21 PRIMARY feeders; 3 members (Axial Fan Panel-1, Axial Fan Panel-2, Frisking+Security) are dark and honest-blank their slots.
